title: MetaJudge Benchmark Data v3 (Families A+B+C)
description: MetaJudge benchmark v3: adds Family C (Self-Correction) to existing Family A (Calibration) and Family B (Selective Abstention). Family C: 55 clean items (30 C1 intrinsic + 25 C2 evidence-assisted). Registry extended with Family C grading entries. Family A/B data unchanged from v2.
